objects.name: Analytic 1743
objects.description: Defender observes an OAuth/OIDC redirect (ACTION_VIEW) resolved to a non-allowlisted handler package (logcat:IntentResolver), followed within a short window by that same package accessing token material via AccountManager/Keystore or reading application token caches under /data/data/<pkg>/(shared_prefs|databases) (logcat:AccountManager, logcat:Keystore, logcat:FileIO). Correlate on package/UID/profile and time proximity to indicate token acquisition.

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: android:logcat
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: ACTION_VIEW redirect_uri handled by unexpected package

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: android:logcat
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: Task switch from browser/custom tab to handler immediately after OAuth return

x_mitre_mutable_elements.description: Max seconds between redirect handling and token access (e.g., 30–180).
Approved redirect URI patterns per app (HTTPS/app-scheme).
Expected package names allowed to handle the redirect.
Restrict to enterprise work profile to reduce personal-app noise.
